# Linkare Medical Knowledge — Full Corpus

> Generated: {{ site.time | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}

---

{% assign profiles = site.pages | where: "layout", "profile" | sort: "hospital" %}
## Hospitals
{% for profile in profiles %}
### {{ profile.hospital }}{% if profile.hospital_en %} ({{ profile.hospital_en }}){% endif %}

- tenant_key: `{{ profile.tenant_key }}`
- URL: {{ profile.url | absolute_url }}{% if profile.doctor %}
- 대표: {{ profile.doctor }}{% if profile.doctor_en %} ({{ profile.doctor_en }}){% endif %}{% endif %}{% if profile.specialty %}
- 진료 분야: {{ profile.specialty }}{% endif %}{% if profile.location %}
- 소재지: {{ profile.location }}{% endif %}{% if profile.website %}
- 홈페이지: {{ profile.website }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

## Articles

{% assign articles = site.pages | where: "layout", "article" | sort: "last_updated" | reverse %}{% for article in articles %}
---

### {{ article.title }}

- URL: {{ article.url | absolute_url }}
- 원문 (canonical): {{ article.canonical_url | default: article.url | absolute_url }}
- 저자: {{ article.author | default: "" }}
- 병원: {{ article.hospital | default: "" }}
- 언어: {{ article.lang | default: "ko" }}{% if article.categories %}
- 카테고리: {{ article.categories | join: ", " }}{% endif %}{% if article.tags %}
- 태그: {{ article.tags | join: ", " }}{% endif %}
- 최종 수정: {{ article.last_updated }}
- 라이선스: {{ article.license | default: "CC BY-NC 4.0" }}

{% if article.description %}**요약**: {{ article.description }}

{% endif %}{{ article.content | strip_html | strip_newlines | replace: "  ", " " | truncate: 8000 }}

{% endfor %}
